author: y4rr
content: ferrotorch-rl crate added (27th workspace member). MlpPolicy: extractor (Linear(4→64) + Tanh + Linear(64→64) + Tanh, separate pi/vf trunks) + action_net (Linear(64→2) for discrete action logits) + value_net (Linear(64→1)). PASS bit-level: action_logits max_abs=9.5e-7, value max_abs=7.6e-6, cosine_sim=1.0 both. Pinned to ferrotorch/ppo-cartpole-v1 (SHA e6c81ac2c102). 8 lib tests.
